title: NVIDIA’s Nemotron 3 Is... Awesome?
summary: NVIDIA released Nemotron 3 Nano, Super, and Ultra models that combine hybrid mamba transformer, mixture of experts, and MTP architectures. The video examines how these architectural innovations distinguish Nemotron 3 from other open-source models.
writeup: The video covers NVIDIA's Nemotron 3 release, which spans three model sizes: Nano, Super, and Ultra. It examines the architectural choices that set the series apart from other open models, specifically a hybrid mamba transformer design, multi-token prediction (MTP), and a Latent Mixture of Experts approach. The takeaway is that these combined techniques are what differentiate Nemotron 3 from competing open releases.
